DisplayName validator empty returns error
CampaignStage scheduled campaign resolves to scheduled stage
CampaignStage live campaign resolves to live stage
Email validator correct value returns no errors
Email validator without top level domain returns error
Email validator empty returns error
CampaignStage draft campaign resolves to draft stage
CampaignStage completed campaign resolves to completed stage
